description: Bottom part of a deed of indemnity. Location: Fustat. Dated: Wednesday, 13 Sivan 1351 Seleucid = 28 May 1040 CE. In which Ḥasan b. ʿAllūn Ibn al-Judayy confirms that he has received, on behalf of his sister Karīma, that which had been deposited with Ḥusn, mother of Hannah, Sarah and Isaac, the children of Burayh al-Šīrajī (i.e. Abraham, the maker of sesame oil). Witnessed by Khalaf b. Moshe, Yosef b. Yaʿaqov, Ṣibyān b. Saʿadya ha-Kohen, Shela b. Saʿadya, Yaʿaqov b. Sahlān, David b. Ḥayyim, Mevorakh b. David, Shelomo b. ʿEli, Yaʿaqov b. Avraham, ʿEli b. Khalaf, and Mubārak b. Yisraʾel. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index cards.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
